## Description

A clear and concise description of what the feature is and what problem it solves.

## Motivation

Why should this feature be added? What are the use cases?

## Proposed Solution

How do you think this should work? Provide examples if possible.


```typescript
// How would this look in the host API?
```

## Alternatives

Have you considered alternative approaches? What are the pros and cons?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or inspiration here.
